activeAbilities.name: Goblin Jazz Funk Solo
activeAbilities.description: All other models within the pulse move 1” directly away.

arcaneAbilities.name: Healing
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target restores X+1 Wds.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 2 Wds.

arcaneAbilities.name: Lullaby
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target model must discard half its energy rounding up, then it restores 2 Wds. 
Catastrophe: This model suffers 2 Wds.

arcaneAbilities.name: Blighted Elixir
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target is moved X" directly away.
Target gains X-1 energy.
Target suffers X Wds.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 2 Wds.

signatureMove.name: Panic and Flee
signatureMove.endStepEffect: Move this model 3” directly away from the enemy. Discard all energy on this character.
